queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account influences credit risk mitigation and reduces default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: assessing the role of a negative checking account balance in credit risk reduction and borrower financial stability.
Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of how extended loan duration in months contributes to increased default probability.
